title: Meeting
description: A scheduled meeting time/place for a section in the Purdue.io OData course catalog. Derived from the live OData v4 $metadata for the PurdueIo.Database.Models.Meeting entity type.

SectionId.description: Foreign key to the owning Section.

Type.description: Meeting type, e.g. Lecture or Laboratory.

DaysOfWeek.description: Flags enumeration of meeting days (IsFlags, may be comma-separated combination of member names).

StartTime.description: Meeting start time of day (Edm.TimeOfDay, HH:mm:ss.fffffff).

Duration.description: Meeting duration (Edm.Duration, ISO 8601 duration, e.g. PT50M).
